cards.name: Full Moon
cards.quote: The night sky glows, awakening ancient horrors to ride forth.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> Nazgul and agents hasted; non-Nazgul in open slowed; armies +10% attack
<sprite name="freePeople"> emissaries gain Hope; near Nazgul revealed and feared
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Long Shadows
cards.quote: When long shadows fall, old fears wake first.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> forest beasts: Hasted and Hidden; open-terrain chars slowed
<sprite name="freePeople"> forest emissaries gain Arcane Insight; forest chars feared and revealed
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Secrets from a Lost Tome
cards.quote: Some lore sleeps long before it is fit to be read.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> artifacts in radius 2 and gain +1 <sprite name="mage"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: MountDoom
cards.quote: MountDoom broods in fire and ash, as though the mountain itself had grown a bitter heart.

cards.name: BorderPatrolling
cards.quote: A border well watched is a border half held.
cards.actionEffect: Eyes on the borders, always. Reveal the surrounding area, detect nearby enemies, and Halt an enemy army commander in your hex.

cards.name: Rain
cards.quote: Rain washes ash from the road and teaches patience.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> Burning cleared; armies +5% attack; all slowed; siege 25% halt chance
<sprite name="freePeople"> Burning cleared; cavalry extra slowed; siege 50% halt chance; armies -10% attack
<sprite name="Neutral"> Burning cleared

cards.name: War spoils
cards.quote: Spoils won by war are often bitter to count.
cards.actionEffect: The spoils of war fill hands and harden hearts. Gain 2 <sprite name="iron">, 1 <sprite name="steel">, and 1 <sprite name="leather">; choose 1 allied character here to gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> or Fortified <sprite name="fortified">.

cards.name: Marked by a Nazgul
cards.quote: The shadow of the Nazgul brings a chilling touch of despair.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply MorgulTouch (1 turn).

cards.name: Orc Draught
cards.quote: In the depths of despair, even the wicked find a flicker of strength.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a small amount and gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: OrcRebellion
cards.quote: The chains of tyranny shall be shattered in the fires of revolt!
cards.actionEffect: Target allied army commander in your hex: gain +1 permanent Commander and lose 1 unit of the weakest army troop type.

cards.name: Hidden in Hides
cards.quote: In rough hides, much that is dear may be concealed.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in your hex are Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn); caster gains Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Rallied Men
cards.quote: When the call goes out, old loyalties wake.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Human units gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Empalisades
cards.quote: A palisade hastily raised may still hold a night of dread.
cards.actionEffect: If you are on an allied population center, increase its fortification by 1.

cards.name: Shielded
cards.quote: A shield is but a promise made in wood and steel.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn), and if the target has Fear <sprite name="fear"> remove it.

cards.name: Sniped!
cards.quote: A swift arrow flies, carrying the promise of fear and pain.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy in same/adjacent hex: inflict small wound and Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Traps
cards.quote: A snare laid unseen waits longest of all.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> (1 turn) and Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Well-equipped Army
cards.quote: Well equipped hosts are less shaken by the first terror.
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn).

cards.name: WhenThereIsAWhip
cards.quote: The crack of the whip heralds a surge of relentless might.
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (3 turns).

cards.name: Doors of Night
cards.quote: The doors swing wide, inviting the dark to overcome the dawn.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> all units gain Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn); dispels Dawn
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Barad-dur
cards.quote: Barad-dûr broods over the ash like the final answer of a will that would not bend.

cards.name: Grond
cards.quote: The Hammer of the Underworld breaches walls with thunderous wrath.

cards.name: Trebuchets
cards.quote: With every stone cast, we hurl defiance at our foes.

cards.name: Crossbow Orcs
cards.quote: Hidden in shadows, their bolts find the hearts of the unwary.

cards.name: Orcs
cards.quote: Savage and relentless, they surge like a tide of darkness.

cards.name: Warg Riders
cards.quote: Swift as the wind, they hunt with teeth and claws unsheathed.

cards.name: Head Catapults
cards.quote: These monstrous machines bring down the fury of the siege.

cards.name: Mounted Half-Orcs
cards.quote: With the speed of a wild storm, they charge into battle.

cards.name: Half Orcs
cards.quote: Born of shadow, they revel in chaos and bloodshed.

cards.name: Half Trolls
cards.quote: Brute strength defines them, a terror to all who dare oppose.

cards.name: Hobgoblins
cards.quote: Cunning and quick, they strike like a dagger in the dark.

cards.name: Gollum
cards.quote: My precious... it must be mine, oh yes, mine!
cards.actionEffect: Reveal a hidden artifact <sprite name="artifact"> on a visible hex.

cards.name: Sauron
cards.quote: Three rings for the elven-kings, seven for the dwarves, nine for mortal men — and one to rule them all.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: False Parley
cards.quote: Words can be as sharp as swords; choose them wisely.
cards.actionEffect: The two easternmost allied armies gain +1 <sprite name="hc"> and +1 <sprite name="lc">.

cards.name: Lured by Halflings' Leaf
cards.quote: The sweet scent of the Shire can ensnare even the mightiest of foes.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy Maia in radius 2: Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn) and Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> (2 turns).

cards.name: WildFire
cards.quote: The forest weeps as flames dance, a terrible beauty unleashed.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> Orcs/Goblins in forest gain Haste; 5% chance of Burning (collateral)
<sprite name="freePeople"> forest emissaries gain Arcane Insight; 20% chance of Burning; Burning units halted
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Gorgoroth
cards.quote: A desolate wasteland, echoing with the cries of the damned.

cards.name: Gothmog
cards.quote: I am the darkness that consumes all hope.
cards.actionEffect: Grant 15 XP to all controlled armies.

cards.name: Curse
cards.quote: Words spoken in malice carry weight beyond measure.
cards.actionEffect: Wound an enemy character.

cards.name: Corruption
cards.quote: The spirit falters where the shadow touches.
cards.actionEffect: <sprite name="poisoned">Poison an enemy character (turns scale with Mage).

cards.name: Ships
cards.quote: Upon the dark waters, timber and sail become the teeth of war.

cards.name: Hide
cards.quote: Not all who walk unseen are thieves; some are merely careful.
cards.actionEffect: For 1 turn: invisible to enemy <sprite name="scout"> scout actions, hidden from scouted hexes, and cannot be selected for duels.

cards.name: Refuse Duel
cards.quote: The coward lives; the proud man feeds the crows.
cards.actionEffect: Decline a pending duel challenge.

cards.name: Train Army
cards.quote: Discipline is the iron that outlasts the blade.
cards.actionEffect: Train your <sprite name="army">army, granting it experience.

cards.name: Scout Area
cards.quote: The wise general counts the enemy's fires before lighting his own.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal surrounding hexes and detect hidden enemy characters nearby.

cards.name: Transfer Artifact
cards.quote: Power passes most safely through hands that do not grasp.
cards.actionEffect: Pass a carried <sprite name="artifact">artifact to another character in the same hex.

cards.name: Twilight
cards.quote: In twilight's embrace, shadows lengthen and secrets are revealed.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> in concealing terrain Hidden; agents Hidden; in open slowed
<sprite name="freePeople"> agents gain Arcane Insight; lose scouting; armies -10% attack
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Ithilien camp
cards.quote: Ithilien keeps its skill beneath leaf and shadow.
cards.actionEffect: The rangers melt into the shadow of Ithilien. All allied Dunedain in radius 5 gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Snow
cards.quote: The whiteness of winter takes what warmth the road remembers.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> Orcs/mountain units gain Hidden; non-mountain units slowed; armies +5% attack
<sprite name="freePeople"> 10% freeze chance; cavalry 20% freeze chance
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: New Moon
cards.quote: On the night of no moon, secrets move with greatest ease.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> all gain Hidden; agents gain Arcane Insight; cavalry slowed
<sprite name="freePeople"> agents gain Arcane Insight; non-agents in open revealed and slowed
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Moon
cards.quote: The pale moon stirs dark things where light has left the field.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> Encouraged; Nazgul gain Hidden; in open slowed
<sprite name="freePeople"> emissaries gain Arcane Insight; gain Fear; armies -10% attack
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Drown
cards.quote: The waters rose and did not ask who was worthy.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> shore chars +1 movement; on water slowed; armies +5% attack; water chars take 15 damage
<sprite name="freePeople"> naval 20% chance to lose a warship; water chars take 15 damage
<sprite name="Neutral"> water chars take 15 damage each turn

cards.name: Gloom
cards.quote: Creeping darkness saps all hope before a sword is drawn.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> Encouraged; in open slowed; armies +10% attack
<sprite name="freePeople"> emissaries gain Arcane Insight; Despaired and Feared; armies -15% attack
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Pollution
cards.quote: Where the shadow spreads, even the air turns against the living.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> armies +8% attack; in rivers/swamps slowed
<sprite name="freePeople"> emissaries gain Arcane Insight; 10% poisoned; in swamps Despaired; armies -12% attack
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Fog
cards.quote: Thick mist grants stealth to those who know the land, and confusion to those who do not.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> in concealing terrain gain Hidden; in open slowed
<sprite name="freePeople"> in open slowed; 35% chance of Halted
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Clouds
cards.quote: Beneath covered skies, the sword-arm grows uncertain.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> armies +8% attack; open-terrain units slowed
<sprite name="freePeople"> mages gain Arcane Insight; armies -15% attack
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Wind
cards.quote: The great eagles rode the gale, and even the fell beasts stretched their wings wide.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> flyers +4 movement; plains chars +1 movement; cavalry slowed; armies +5% attack
<sprite name="freePeople"> flyers -2 movement
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Catapults
cards.quote: They hurl destruction, turning stone into a storm of chaos.
